inline_comments.message:
Instead of JsonUtils it would be better if we name this class as ArtifactUtils as we already have JsonUtils class which has methods for generic json handling.

Since the only method here is specific to building a json for Artifact so I feel that naming this class in terms of artifact and keeping under src\main\java\org\openecomp\sdc\be\components\utils in catalog-be would be better.

Hi Ojas,

I agree with everything you said, I will do the changes as requested. To answer your question regarding the motivation for moving this code, the goal is to decompose the ArtifactsBusinessLogic class into smaller chunks to make it more manageable. Currently, the responsibility of that class is too broad, which makes it hard to test and to maintain.

I agree that moving this method does not add much but it is a first step. In the future, this logic may be put elsewhere. So see this as an intermediate refactoring step, not a final state.

Does this answer your question?
